name: 设备界面模型

prompt_template.subject: {product_description} displayed on device screen
prompt_template.desk_accessories: coffee cup, plant, notebook, natural work environment
prompt_template.lighting: natural window light with warm fill
prompt_template.quality: 8K, tech product photography, screen content tack-sharp

defaults.desk_accessories: coffee cup, small plant, wireless mouse, notebook
defaults.lighting: soft window light from left, warm overhead fill

overrides.device: MacBook Pro showing product interface, shallow depth of field on screen
iPad center + iPhone left + smartwatch right, all showing consistent app UI
iPhone held at slight angle in hand, lifestyle background, screen clearly visible

overrides.desk_accessories: Aesop hand cream, Muji pen holder, latte with art, hardcover notebook, trailing plant on shelf
overrides.background: Scandinavian home office with white bookshelf

category_tips.saas: show dashboard with charts, KPI cards, data visualizations
category_tips.mobile_app: show app interface on phone, notification visible, clean UI
category_tips.ecommerce_platform: show store admin dashboard with product listings and analytics
category_tips.fintech: show financial dashboard with graphs, portfolio summary
category_tips.health_app: show workout tracker, health metrics, progress charts
category_tips.ai_product: show chat interface, AI responses, modern dark or light theme

examples: Product mockup on laptop. Silver laptop on white desk, screen showing modern dashboard with charts. Coffee cup and small plant nearby. Natural window light. Clean product photography, 8K
Multi-device mockup. iPad with keyboard showing {product} app, iPhone showing notification, Apple Watch showing widget. All screens consistent UI in sage green. Scandinavian desk, 8K, 1536x1024px
